id: I Won't Tell a Soul Charlie Puth
folderName: I Won't Tell a Soul Charlie Puth
setting: Chloe is at Sam's apartment late at night, feeling conflicted about her partner at home.
lyrics:
Oh darling
Know you’re taken
Something ‘bout this
Just don’t feel right
Every time
One of us, tries to leave here
Oh the other one
Holds on tight

Oh oh

Baby tonight
There’s so much love in between us
But you say you gotta get home
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul

You tell me someone
Waiting for you
That you can’t do this anymore
But you kiss me again
So go ahead and
Draw the blinds and
Lock all the doors

Baby tonight
There’s so much love in between us
But you say you gotta get home
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul

Oh if you want me
Like I want you
I won’t judge you

This could be our little secret
Our secret
So tell me if you’re ready
‘Cause if no one knows then
It ain’t really cheating
Oh darling
I know you’re taken
But something ‘bout this
Just feels so right
Oh baby
‘cause every time
One of us, tries to leave here
Oh the other one
Holds on tight

Oh oh

Baby tonight

There’s so much love in between us
But you say you gotta get home
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul

lyricsJa.en:
Oh darling
Know you’re taken
lyricsJa.ja:
ねえ、ダーリン
君に相手がいるのはわかってる

lyricsJa.en:
Something ‘bout this
Just don’t feel right
lyricsJa.ja:
でも何かが
正しくない気がするんだ

lyricsJa.en:
Every time
One of us, tries to leave here
lyricsJa.ja: どちらかがここを去ろうとするたびに

lyricsJa.en:
Oh the other one
Holds on tight
lyricsJa.ja: もう一人が強く引き止めてしまう

lyricsJa.en: Oh oh
lyricsJa.ja: Oh oh

lyricsJa.en:
Baby tonight
There’s so much love in between us
lyricsJa.ja:
ベイビー、今夜の僕らの間には
こんなにも愛が溢れているのに

lyricsJa.en: But you say you gotta get home
lyricsJa.ja: 君は「帰らなくちゃ」と言う

lyricsJa.en:
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul
lyricsJa.ja:
僕のそばにいて
誰にも言わないから

lyricsJa.en:
You tell me someone
Waiting for you
lyricsJa.ja:
誰かが君を待っているんだと
君は言う

lyricsJa.en: That you can’t do this anymore
lyricsJa.ja: 「もうこんなことできない」って

lyricsJa.en: But you kiss me again
lyricsJa.ja: なのに君はまた僕にキスをする

lyricsJa.en:
So go ahead and
Draw the blinds and
Lock all the doors
lyricsJa.ja:
だからもう
ブラインドを閉めて
扉に鍵をかけてよ

lyricsJa.en:
Baby tonight
There’s so much love in between us
lyricsJa.ja:
ベイビー、今夜の僕らの間には
こんなにも愛が溢れているのに

lyricsJa.en: But you say you gotta get home
lyricsJa.ja: 君は「帰らなくちゃ」と言う

lyricsJa.en:
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul
lyricsJa.ja:
僕のそばにいて
誰にも言わないから

lyricsJa.en:
Oh if you want me
Like I want you
lyricsJa.ja:
僕が君を想うように
君も僕を求めてくれるなら

lyricsJa.en: I won’t judge you
lyricsJa.ja: 君を責めたりはしない

lyricsJa.en:
This could be our little secret
Our secret
lyricsJa.ja:
これは僕たちだけの秘密
二人だけの秘密にしよう

lyricsJa.en: So tell me if you’re ready
lyricsJa.ja: 覚悟ができたら教えて

lyricsJa.en:
‘Cause if no one knows then
It ain’t really cheating
lyricsJa.ja:
誰にも知られなければ
浮気じゃないも同然だから

lyricsJa.en:
Oh darling
I know you’re taken
lyricsJa.ja:
ねえ、ダーリン
君に相手がいるのはわかってる

lyricsJa.en:
But something ‘bout this
Just feels so right
lyricsJa.ja:
でもこれが
どうしようもなく正解に感じるんだ

lyricsJa.en:
Oh baby
‘cause every time
lyricsJa.ja:
ねえ、ベイビー
だっていつだって

lyricsJa.en:
One of us, tries to leave here
Oh the other one
Holds on tight
lyricsJa.ja:
どちらかがここを去ろうとすると
もう一人が強く引き止めてしまうんだ

lyricsJa.en: Oh oh
lyricsJa.ja: Oh oh

lyricsJa.en: Baby tonight
lyricsJa.ja: ベイビー、今夜は

lyricsJa.en: There’s so much love in between us
lyricsJa.ja: 僕らの間にはこんなに愛が溢れている

lyricsJa.en: But you say you gotta get home
lyricsJa.ja: それなのに君は帰らなきゃと言う

lyricsJa.en:
Stay here with me
I won’t tell a soul
lyricsJa.ja:
僕のそばにいて
誰にも言わないから

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I have someone waiting for me at home.
sentences.displayHtml: I have someone waiting for me at home.

conversation.japanese: そろそろ行かなくちゃ。家で誰かが待ってるから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: But every time you try to leave, I just want to hold on tight.
sentences.displayHtml: But every time you try to leave, I just want to hold on tight.

conversation.japanese: 分かってるよ。でも君が帰ろうとするたびに、強く引き止めたくなっちゃうんだ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, something about this just feels so right, even though I know I'm taken.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, something about this just feels so right, even though I know I'm taken.

conversation.japanese: 私も同じ。正直言って、こうしているのがすごくしっくりくるの。自分の立場は分かっているんだけど。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Just stay here with me for a little longer.
sentences.displayHtml: Just stay here with me for a little longer.

sentences.text: It can be our little secret.
sentences.displayHtml: It can be our little secret.

conversation.japanese: もう少しだけ一緒にここにいようよ。二人の秘密にすればいい。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I keep telling myself I can’t do this anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep telling myself I can’t do this anymore.

sentences.text: But then you kiss me and I change my mind.
sentences.displayHtml: But then you kiss me and I change my mind.

conversation.japanese: もうこんなことやめなきゃって自分に言い聞かせてるんだけど。でも、あなたにキスされると気持ちが変わっちゃう。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I won't tell a soul about us.
sentences.displayHtml: I won't tell a soul about us.

conversation.japanese: 何も言わなくていいよ。僕たちのことは誰にも言わないから。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Just lock the door so we can finally be alone.
sentences.displayHtml: Just lock the door so we can finally be alone.

conversation.japanese: 分かったわ。やっと二人きりになれるように、ドアに鍵をかけて。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: If no one knows what we're doing, then it's fine.
sentences.displayHtml: If no one knows what we're doing, then it's fine.

conversation.japanese: そうだね。誰にも知られなければ、何も問題ないよ。
